messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "node_id": "0082",
  "title": "画面与音效表现",
  "page_index": 32,
  "page_range": "32"
}

message.content: This section, titled "画面与音效表现" (Visual and Audio Performance), indicates coverage of topics related to graphical presentation and sound design. Based on the provided text, it contains no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Consequently, it can only answer high-level navigational questions confirming the presence of a segment dedicated to visual and audio evaluation, but lacks the substantive content required to answer detailed factual, analytical, or data-driven queries.
